'''halupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabanossi|cabanossi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabanossi|cabanossi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| halupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hælipith|hælipith]] || [[word:hælipij|hælipij]] || [[word:hælipish|hælipish]] || [[word:hælipi|hælipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haluluputh|haluluputh]] || [[word:halulupuj|halulupuj]] || [[word:halulupush|halulupush]] || [[word:halulupu|halulupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haluputh|haluputh]] || [[word:halupuj|halupuj]] || [[word:halupush|halupush]] || [[word:halupu|halupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:halufputh|halufputh]] || [[word:halufpuj|halufpuj]] || [[word:halufpush|halufpush]] || [[word:halufpuf|halufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haluputhu|haluputhu]] || [[word:halupuju|halupuju]] || [[word:halupushu|halupushu]] || [[word:halupuku|halupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haluputh|haluputh]] || [[word:halupuj|halupuj]] || [[word:halupush|halupush]] || [[word:halupu|halupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haluputhul|haluputhul]] || [[word:halupujul|halupujul]] || [[word:halupushul|halupushul]] || [[word:halupukul|halupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haluputhuthu|haluputhuthu]] || [[word:halupujuju|halupujuju]] || [[word:halupushushu|halupushushu]] || [[word:halupuku|halupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haluputhun|haluputhun]] || [[word:halupujun|halupujun]] || [[word:halupushun|halupushun]] || [[word:halupukun|halupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haluputhuoro|haluputhuoro]] || [[word:halupujuoro|halupujuoro]] || [[word:halupushuoro|halupushuoro]] || [[word:halupukuoro|halupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
